thirdpartycookie.explanation:
Some browsers block third-party cookies, which can prevent YouTube chat login on Holodex.

To fix this, allow YouTube.com cookies in your third-party cookie blocker, or lower the cookie privacy setting for Holodex.net.

The links below provide more details.
thirdpartycookie.alertText: Your browser privacy settings are blocking YouTube chat login. Click here for more information.

library.exportYTExplanation: This feature creates an unlisted YouTube playlist, which YouTube may delete. To save the playlist to your account, follow these steps.
library.exportYTInstructions:
Step 1: Play the YouTube playlist and switch the player to mini-player.

Step 2: Pick any video and add it to the queue.

Step 3: The playlist can now be saved. Click save to save it.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.ytchatHeader: YouTube chat is not logged in
faq.ytchatContent: Disable third-party cookie blocking, or allow cookies for this site and youtube.com so YouTube chat can stay logged in.
faq.ytchatFirefox: Firefox instructions, other browsers may be similar.
faq.autoplayContent: Enable autoplay in your browser settings.
faq.musicPlayer: Music player does not work well on mobile devices
faq.musicPlayerContent: On most iOS devices, Holodex music stops when you turn off the screen or close Safari. Some Android devices have the same restriction. Send feedback on Discord if you know a better playback approach.
faq.videoLinkage: How do I make sure videos are linked to the right VTubers?
faq.videoLinkageContent: Holodex parses source links from the video description. If you clip a stream, link the official stream. If you clip fan-made content, such as Bilibili uploads, link the official YouTube channels for the relevant VTubers. Clips without links to known VTubers may be hidden.
faq.quitHolodex: I am a subber and want my channel removed from Holodex
faq.quitHolodexContent: Please send us a message on Discord. If there is an issue we can help with, include that too.

Contents.0: Favorites help you follow your favorite VTubers. Add channels by clicking the heart icon on the
Contents.1: page. Please note that favoriting subbers is currently not supported, but you should still consider subscribing and supporting them in other ways!

disappear.title: My favorites list disappeared / I cannot favorite

contents.0: Please make sure you are logged in and visit the channels favorites tab to force a refresh.

mobile.title: Is there an Android/iOS app for Holodex?

content.summary: We are working on it. In the meantime, use your browser's "Add to Home Screen" feature. Holodex is tuned to behave like an app.

android.0: Android Chrome: Navigate to the site, click the three dots
android.1: on the top right and find "Add to Home Screen".

ios.0: iOS Safari: Navigate to the site on your phone, click the square with arrow pointing up
ios.1: at the bottom of Safari, and tap "Add to Home Screen"

contents.0: MugenClips is a watch-along room where everyone sees a rotating set of clips from community translation channels.

subber.title: I'm a subber and can't find my channel or clips on Holodex

contents.0: Please check on the Channels page to see if you are listed as a subber, if not please fill out
contents.2: , and we will add you manually. If you are already listed, make sure your video descriptions include the correct YouTube source and channel links.

feedback.title: I have feedback or want to contribute

contents.0: All help and ideas are welcome. The UI and backend are both available for contribution, although only the UI is open source right now. Contact us on Discord for backend source access or to discuss ideas.

Our self-hosted server is a 28-core, 60 GB RAM machine that costs about $60 USD per month. We use Ko-fi to cover server costs. We also have a Patreon, but Ko-fi is preferred.

You can also support Holodex by sending feedback, helping translate via Crowdin, contributing song data, or sharing useful stream timestamps.

about.gdprContent: Holodex may use a Google Analytics cookie to track pageviews. After login, we associate your social media account username and ID with your favorites. This data may include your email address for Google, Discord ID, or Twitter handle.
about.gdprDeletion: Contact us on Discord to delete your user data.
about.feedbackHtml:
Create an issue in the GitHub issue tracker, or find the Holodex team on Discord.

Reddit: u/Rice_cakess

bookmarklet.title: Bookmarklets
bookmarklet.description: Drag these bookmarklets to your bookmark bar to open YouTube watch pages in Holodex:

content.intro: This page explains what data Holodex handles and how third-party services are used.

firstParty.title: Holodex data
firstParty.collection: Holodex stores the account identifiers, favorites, settings, playlists, and editor actions needed to provide site features.
firstParty.voluntary: Most account data is created only when you sign in or use account features.
firstParty.access: You can access or update your user settings from your account menu.
firstParty.limitedUse: Holodex uses Google user data only for sign-in and account linking features.
firstParty.noPosting: Holodex does not post to your linked accounts.
firstParty.revoking: You can revoke third-party account access from the provider account settings.
firstParty.changes: This policy may change when site features or provider requirements change.

thirdParty.title: Third-party services
thirdParty.analyticsBody: Holodex may use analytics to understand site usage and reliability.
thirdParty.analyticsUse: Analytics data is used to improve performance, navigation, and stability.
thirdParty.embedsBody: YouTube and Twitch embeds are provided by those services and may use their own cookies and account state.
thirdParty.linksIntro: See these provider policies for details:
thirdParty.choicesBody: You can block third-party cookies or sign out of linked providers, though some embedded features may stop working.
thirdParty.contactBody: Contact the Holodex team through Discord or GitHub for privacy questions.
thirdParty.commitment: Holodex only asks for the access needed to run its features.

youtubeTerms.before: Use of embedded YouTube features is subject to the

Types.AddVtuber: Add a VTuber channel for Holodex to track streams and clips.
Types.AddClipper: Add a clipping or subbing channel to Holodex

channelRequest.DirectContactDisclaimer: Leave a Discord ID, email, or Twitter handle if we may need to contact you. This stays private and is visible only to Holodex administrators.
channelRequest.VtuberGroupHint: Which organization or group does this VTuber belong to?
channelRequest.EnglishNameHint: Provide an English name if the channel name is not in English. Follow the VTuber's native name order, such as Natsuiro Matsuri, or use the preferred English brand name, such as Elu the Elf.
channelRequest.CommentsHint: Anything else you want us to know.
channelRequest.VtuberRequirementText:
Independent VTubers need at least 15K subscribers. VTubers from existing organizations are accepted.

New organizations are created based on average subscriber count.

Twitch streamers must have an official YouTube channel to be indexed.

Any mention of past lives or alternate identities will be rejected.
channelRequest.ClipperRequirementText:
Clipper channels must be at least 2 months old and post regularly, or post more than 20 clips in one month. Daily spam, mostly short clips under 1 minute, or unflattering thumbnails may count against the channel. Content quality may also be reviewed.

Clippers should cite sources with channel links, @YouTube channel mentions, and video links. Overciting, such as linking everyone at Nijisanji, creates work for Holodex editors. Underciting may make clips hidden.

Holodex has algorithms to detect and correct overciting, but they may not always work perfectly. Clippers who overcite may be removed from the platform to reduce noise.
channelRequest.DeletionRequirementText: Only channel owners should request deletion. Provide contact information so we can verify ownership.
channelRequest.DirectContactPlaceholder: Discord, email, or other contact method
